allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('glossary:', json.dumps\(d['spec']['glossary'], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('dataModels:', len\(d['spec']['dataModels']\), 'apiEndpoints:', len\(d['spec']['apiEndpoints']\)\)")
